texto: The public talk -- and injuriously! -- Well! are you ignorant of the little importance of such talk? -- The public speak! -- It is not the world, it is only the despicable part of it -- only the ill-natured, who upon the smallest evidence pass rash judgements, and anticipate events, the wise wait for them and are silent.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Joseph Boruwlaski que provoca temas ligados a sabedoria. Ao questionar “The public talk -- and injuriously! -- Well! are you ignorant of the little importance of such ta…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, criticism, gossip, com foco em gossip.
